title: Gizmos
description: A mod that adds a bunch of wacky items and mechanics to Minecraft.
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Logo.png) Requires GeckoLib # Table of Contents - [What kind of mod is Gizmos?](#what-kind-of-mod-is-gizmos-) - [Weapons](#weapons) - [Firework Star Block](#firework-star-block) - [Cultivated Shulker](#cultivated-shulker) - [Rideable Ravager](#rideable-ravager) - [Horseshoes](#horseshoes) - [Status Infused Snow Golems](#Status-Infused-Snow-Golems) - [Seeker Arrows](#Seeker-Arrows) # What kind of mod is Gizmos? ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page1.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page2.png) Gizmos is a mod that adds a diverse variety of new blocks, items, and mechanics that shake up the traditional vanilla Minecraft experience. \ In other words, Gizmos mismashes some of the random Minecraft mod ideas that I've had into a single compact package. \ From homemade flamethrowers to rideable ravagers, Gizmos is filled to the brim with concepts that are - at most - only loosely connected to each other! # Weapons ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page3_with_images.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page4_with_image.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page5_with_images.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page6_with_images.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page7_with_image.png) As of right now, Gizmos adds two new weapons to the game: \ The Soul Fire Spitter is a homemade flamethrower cobbled together with spare parts and fueled by blaze powder. \ The Slingshot is a fantastic, elastic item that can be used to hurl snowballs, eggs, and ender pearls over long distances. # Firework Star Block ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page8.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page9_with_image.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page10_with_image.png) Taking inspiration from cubfan135's "Minecraft Opportunities" series, this mod adds the Firework Star Block to the game! The Firework Star Block is used to craft your own customized Firework Star. # Cultivated Shulker [![](http://img.youtube.com/vi/nznvp47uRSc/0.jpg)](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nznvp47uRSc "") ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page11_with_images.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page12_with_images.png) This mod also adds the chorus gourd block, which can be crafted by surrounding a pumpkin with chorus flowers on a crafting table. \ Chorus Gourds can be sheared to spawn cultivated shulkers that are friendly to players and attack hostile mobs. # Rideable Ravagers [![](http://img.youtube.com/vi/pWXXgl4CYy0/0.jpg)](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pWXXgl4CYy0 "") ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page13.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page14_with_image.png) Ravagers are now tamable and rideable! Just reduce a ravager to 1 heart and feed it a golden apple to tame it! You can ride around on your new best friend and have it assist you in combat. # Horseshoes ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page15_with_images.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page16_with_images.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/page17.png) You can attach horseshoes to mounts (including tamed ravagers) to give them a significant speed boost! \ Horseshoes can also be enchanted with any of the enchantments available to regular boots. \ If you want to remove your mount's horseshoes, then just right-click on them with an iron, diamond, or netherite pickaxe. # Status Infused Snow Golems [![](http://img.youtube.com/vi/HaYRIR-GR-0/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HaYRIR-GR-0 "") ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/snow_golems_page_1.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/snow_golems_page_2.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/snow_golems_page_3.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/snow_golems_page_4.png) Gizmos give Snow Golems some much-needed utility by letting players infuse their frosty friends with potion effects! \ Just right-click on a Snow Golem with a potion in your main hand to infuse it with the potion's status effects. \ Each status effect (with a few exceptions) grants Snow Golems a unique benefit. \ I encourage you to experiment with different potions to figure out how to best utilize your new and improved Snow Golem! # Seeker Arrows [![](https://img.youtube.com/vi/pAryq-PDovE/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pAryq-PDovE) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/seeker_arrow_page_1_with_pictures.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/seeker_arrow_page_2_with_pics.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/seeker_arrow_page_3.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HyperPigeon/Gizmos/main/Gizmos%20Images/seeker_arrow_page_4_with_pictures.png) Seeker arrows can hone in on your enemies like a heat-seeking missile! \ Seeker arrows are crafted using a feather, stick, and an eye of ender. \ Seeker arrows will naturally target the Ender Dragon, Shulkers, and Endermen. \ Unlike other projectiles, Endermen cannot dodge seeker arrows! \ If none of the aforementioned mobs are present, then seeker arrows will hone in on entities afflicted with the glowing status effect.
